functions.name: isDefined
functions.description: checks if the argument is not null

functions.name: isUndefined
functions.description: checks if the argument is null

functions.name: isValid
functions.description: checks if the argument is not null

functions.name: isInvalid
functions.description: checks if the argument is null

functions.name: date
functions.description: converts a string to a date. The string must be in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

functions.name: date and time
functions.signature: date and time(from: string) : date and time
functions.description: converts a string to a date and time. The string must be in the format 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS' or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'.

functions.name: time
functions.description: converts a string to a time.

functions.name: string
functions.description: converts a value to a string.

functions.name: duration
functions.description: duration converts a string to a duration or returns a duration if the argument is already a duration.

functions.name: abs
functions.description: returns the absolute value of a number

functions.name: count
functions.description: returns the number of elements in a list

functions.name: round
functions.description: returns the number rounded to the specified number of digits.

functions.name: ceiling
functions.description: returns the number rounded up to the next integer

functions.name: floor
functions.description: returns the number rounded down to the previous integer

functions.name: integer
functions.description: returns the integer part of a number

functions.name: modulo
functions.description: returns the remainder of the division of the dividend by the divisor

functions.name: percent
functions.description: returns the number divided by 100

functions.name: power
functions.description: returns the base raised to the power of the exponent

functions.name: product
functions.description: returns the product of the elements in a list

functions.name: roundDown
functions.description: returns the number rounded down to the specified number of digits.

functions.name: roundUp
functions.description: returns the number rounded up to the specified number of digits.

functions.name: sum
functions.description: returns the sum of the elements in a list

functions.name: concat
functions.description: returns the concatenation of the string representations of the elements in a list

functions.name: isAlpha
functions.description: determines if a string contains only letters (a-z, A-Z)

functions.name: isAlphanumeric
functions.description: determines if a string contains only letters (a-z, A-Z) and digits (0-9)

functions.name: isNumeric
functions.description: determines if a string contains only digits (0-9), plus or minus signs, decimal points

functions.name: isSpaces
functions.description: determines if a string contains only whitespace characters

functions.name: len
functions.description: returns the number of characters in a string

functions.name: lower
functions.description: returns a string with all letters converted to lowercase

functions.name: trim
functions.description: returns a string with all leading and trailing whitespace characters removed

functions.name: upper
functions.description: returns a string with all letters converted to uppercase

functions.name: number
functions.description: returns the number represented by a string. Only a period is allowed as a separator. Return the default value if the string cannot be converted to a number.

functions.name: mid
functions.signature: mid(text: string, start: number, num_chars: number) : string
functions.description: returns the character sequence of the length num_chars from the specified starting position

functions.name: left
functions.description: returns the character sequence of the length num_chars from the start of the string

functions.name: right
functions.description: returns the character sequence of the length num_chars from the end of the string

functions.name: text
functions.description: returns a string representation of a number formatted according to the specified format text. The format text can contain the following characters: 0, #, and .

functions.name: textOccurrences
functions.description: returns the number of occurrences of a string within another string

functions.name: contains
functions.description: determines if a string contains a substring

functions.name: startsWith
functions.description: de

functions.name: endsWith
functions.description: determines if a string ends with a suffix

functions.name: not
functions.description: negates a boolean value

functions.name: day
functions.description: returns the day of the month from a date

functions.name: day
functions.description: returns the day of the month from a date and time

functions.name: dayAdd
functions.description: returns the date resulting from adding the specified number of days to the given date

functions.name: dayAdd
functions.signature: dayAdd(datetime: date and time, days_to_add: number) : date and time
functions.description: returns the date and time resulting from adding the specified number of days to the given date and time

functions.name: dayDiff
functions.description: returns the number of full days between two dates

functions.name: dayDiff
functions.signature: dayDiff(datetime1: date, datetime2: date and time) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full days between a date and a date and time

functions.name: dayDiff
functions.signature: dayDiff(datetime1: date and time, datetime2: date) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full days between a date and time and a date

functions.name: dayDiff
functions.signature: dayDiff(datetime1: date and time, datetime2: date and time) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full days between two dates and times

functions.name: date
functions.signature: date(year: number, month: number, day: number) : date
functions.description: returns a date from the given year, month and day

functions.name: dateTime
functions.signature: dateTime(day: number, month: number, year: number, hour: number, minute: number, second: number, hourOffset: number?) : date and time
functions.description: returns a date and time from the given day, month, year, hour, minute, second and hour offset

functions.name: hour
functions.description: returns the hour of the day from a time

functions.name: hour
functions.description: returns the hour of the day from a date and time

functions.name: hourDiff
functions.description: returns the number of full hours between two temporal values

functions.name: minute
functions.description: returns the minute of the hour from a time

functions.name: minute
functions.description: returns the minute of the hour from a date and time

functions.name: minutesDiff
functions.description: returns the number of full minutes between two temporal values

functions.name: month
functions.description: returns the month of the year from a date

functions.name: month
functions.description: returns the month of the year from a date and time

functions.name: monthAdd
functions.description: returns the date resulting from adding the specified number of months to the given date

functions.name: monthAdd
functions.signature: monthAdd(datetime: date and time, months_to_add: number) : date and time
functions.description: returns the date and time resulting from adding the specified number of months to the given date and time

functions.name: monthDiff
functions.description: returns the number of full months between two dates

functions.name: monthDiff
functions.signature: monthDiff(datetime1: date, datetime2: date and time) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full months between a date and a date and time

functions.name: monthDiff
functions.signature: monthDiff(datetime1: date and time, datetime2: date) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full months between a date and time and a date

functions.name: monthDiff
functions.signature: monthDiff(datetime1: date and time, datetime2: date and time) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full months between two dates and times

functions.name: now
functions.description: returns the current date and time

functions.name: today
functions.description: returns the current date

functions.name: weekday
functions.description: returns a number (1 to 7) representing the day of the week

functions.name: weekday
functions.description: returns a number (1 to 7) representing the day of the week

functions.name: year
functions.description: returns the year from a date

functions.name: year
functions.description: returns the year from a date and time

functions.name: yearAdd
functions.description: returns the date resulting from adding the specified number of years to the given date

functions.name: yearAdd
functions.signature: yearAdd(datetime: date and time, years_to_add: number) : date and time
functions.description: returns the date and time resulting from adding the specified number of years to the given date and time

functions.name: yearDiff
functions.description: returns the number of full years between two dates

functions.name: yearDiff
functions.signature: yearDiff(datetime1: date, datetime2: date and time) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full years between a date and a date and time

functions.name: yearDiff
functions.signature: yearDiff(datetime1: date and time, datetime2: date) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full years between a date and time and a date

functions.name: yearDiff
functions.signature: yearDiff(datetime1: date and time, datetime2: date and time) : number
functions.description: returns the number of full years between two dates and times

functions.name: append
functions.description: adds an element to the end of a list and returns the new list

functions.name: appendAll
functions.description: adds all elements of the second list to the end of the first list and returns the new list

functions.name: remove
functions.description: removes an element from a list and returns the new list

functions.name: removeAll
functions.description: removes all elements of the second list from the first list and returns the new list

functions.name: zip
functions.description: assembles a list of objects from a list of attributes and multiple lists of values

functions.name: notContainsAny
functions.description: determines whether list1 contains none of the elements in list2

functions.name: containsOnly
functions.description: determines whether list1 contains only elements of list2

functions.name: areElementsOf
functions.description: determines whether list2 contains all elements of list1

functions.name: elementOf
functions.description: deprecated: use areElementsOf instead

functions.name: avg
functions.description: returns the average of the elements in a list.

functions.name: max
functions.description: determines the maximum of the elements in a list.

functions.name: median
functions.description: determines the median of the elements in a list.

functions.name: min
functions.description: determines the minimum of the elements in a list.

functions.name: mode
functions.description: determines the mode of the elements in a list.
